column6: Provides the status for calculation fields tied to the Revenue Lifecycle.
column9:
If currency fields have populated on the Quote Line (fields like ARR, MRR, etc), this status field should be set to "Calculated"
If currency fields are blank, this status field should be set to "Not Calculated"
If any issues occur and oinly some of the currency fields have been calculated. this status should be set to "Error"
